series_metadata.series_description: Official correspondence of LSC Director that pertains to LSC policy or responsibilities.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: as active file in Director''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''s office each two year period corresponding session of General Assembly. two year period, as inactive file in Director''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''s office use as needed ; Electronic: as active file in Director''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''s office each two year period corresponding session of General Assembly. two year period, as inactive file in Director''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''''s office use Director determines it is no longer needed; there is no specific time period keep materials
